name: Eyres Monsell
description:
The Eyres Monsell neighbourhood comprises the entire Eyres Monsell Estate, together with the Saffron Lane Estate south of Southfields Drive.

It includes a large school, the Samworth Academy, and retail premises on The Exchange, Swinford Avenue, Hillsborough Road and Southfields Drive. Smaller schools are located within the Eyres Monsell Estate.

To find out more about what's happening in your local area read your local station Inspector's monthly update.
